idea.hook: What if it LITERALLY rained diamonds on other planets?!
facts: Deep inside Uranus & Neptune, pressures reach over 200 Gigapascals (2 MILLION times Earth's atmospheric pressure).
Under these extreme conditions, methane breaks down, forming pure carbon that crystallizes.
idea.payoff: So, it literally RAINS solid diamonds, sinking through vast subsurface oceans of superheated fluid!
idea.title: Diamond Rain on Ice Giants?! 💎🪐

scenes.text: What if it LITERALLY rained diamonds?
scenes.visual: A stylized, dramatic rendering of space with a gas giant planet partially visible, sparkling light hints at something falling.

scenes.text: Deep inside Uranus & Neptune: Pressures > 200 Gigapascals!
scenes.visual: Cross-section animation of a gas giant, highlighting the deep core. Numbers '200 GPa' appear and pulse briefly.
Animated visual of intense heat and energy swirling in the planet's core. Text '7,000°C' appears with a fiery glow.
Abstract animation showing methane molecules (CH4) breaking apart, then individual carbon atoms forming into sparkling crystalline structures (stylized diamonds).

scenes.text: Literally RAINS solid diamonds, sinking through superheated oceans!
scenes.visual: An impactful animation of numerous stylized diamonds steadily falling downwards through a vast, shimmering, translucent fluid (representing the subsurface ocean). Faint outline of a planet's interior above.
